title: Basic Playbook
description:
Write a basic Ansible Playbook that targets all hosts and runs a ping task to check connectivity.

Requirements:
- Set `hosts` to `all`
- Set `name` for the play
- Add one task using the `ansible.builtin.ping` module
description_zh:
编写一个基础 Ansible Playbook，目标为所有主机，运行 ping 任务检测连通性。

要求：
- 设置 `hosts` 为 `all`
- 为 play 设置 `name`
- 添加一个任务，使用 `ansible.builtin.ping` 模块
template:
---
# Write a basic Ansible playbook
# that pings all hosts
- name: 
  hosts: 
  tasks:
    - name:
answer:
---
- name: Test connectivity
  hosts: all
  tasks:
    - name: Ping all hosts
      ansible.builtin.ping:

title: Package Install
description:
Write a playbook to install nginx on web servers.

Requirements:
- Target hosts group `webservers`
- Use `become: true` for privilege escalation
- Use the `ansible.builtin.apt` module to install `nginx`
- Set `state` to `present` and `update_cache` to `yes`
description_zh:
编写一个 playbook 在 Web 服务器上安装 nginx。

要求：
- 目标主机组为 `webservers`
- 使用 `become: true` 进行提权
- 使用 `ansible.builtin.apt` 模块安装 `nginx`
- 设置 `state` 为 `present`，`update_cache` 为 `yes`
template:
---
- name: 
  hosts: 
  become: 
  tasks:
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.apt:
answer:
---
- name: Install nginx on web servers
  hosts: webservers
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Install nginx
      ansible.builtin.apt:
        name: nginx
        state: present
        update_cache: yes

title: File Operations
description:
Write a playbook to manage files on remote hosts.

Requirements:
- Target `all` hosts with `become: true`
- Task 1: Use `ansible.builtin.copy` to copy content "Hello World" to `/tmp/hello.txt`
- Task 2: Use `ansible.builtin.file` to ensure directory `/opt/myapp` exists (state: directory, mode: '0755')
description_zh:
编写一个 playbook 管理远程主机上的文件。

要求：
- 目标为 `all` 主机，使用 `become: true`
- 任务 1：使用 `ansible.builtin.copy` 将内容 "Hello World" 复制到 `/tmp/hello.txt`
- 任务 2：使用 `ansible.builtin.file` 确保目录 `/opt/myapp` 存在（state: directory, mode: '0755'）
template:
---
- name: 
  hosts: 
  become: 
  tasks:
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.copy:
        
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.file:
answer:
---
- name: Manage files on hosts
  hosts: all
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Create hello file
      ansible.builtin.copy:
        content: "Hello World"
        dest: /tmp/hello.txt
    - name: Ensure myapp directory exists
      ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/myapp
        state: directory
        mode: '0755'

title: Variables & Templates
description:
Write a playbook using variables and Jinja2 templates.

Requirements:
- Target `webservers` hosts
- Define `vars` section with: `http_port: 8080` and `app_name: myapp`
- Task: Use `ansible.builtin.template` to generate content using variables
- Use `ansible.builtin.debug` to display: "Deploying {{ app_name }} on port {{ http_port }}"
description_zh:
编写一个使用变量和 Jinja2 模板的 playbook。

要求：
- 目标主机为 `webservers`
- 定义 `vars` 部分：`http_port: 8080` 和 `app_name: myapp`
- 任务：使用 `ansible.builtin.debug` 显示："Deploying {{ app_name }} on port {{ http_port }}"
template:
---
- name: 
  hosts: 
  vars:
    
  tasks:
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.debug:
answer:
---
- name: Deploy with variables
  hosts: webservers
  vars:
    http_port: 8080
    app_name: myapp
  tasks:
    - name: Display deployment info
      ansible.builtin.debug:
        msg: "Deploying {{ app_name }} on port {{ http_port }}"

title: Handlers
description:
Write a playbook that uses handlers to restart a service only when configuration changes.

Requirements:
- Target `webservers` with `become: true`
- Task: Use `ansible.builtin.copy` to copy `src: nginx.conf` to `dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf`, and `notify` the handler `Restart nginx`
- Handler: Use `ansible.builtin.service` to restart nginx (name: nginx, state: restarted)
description_zh:
编写一个使用 handlers 的 playbook，仅在配置变更时重启服务。

要求：
- 目标主机为 `webservers`，使用 `become: true`
- 任务：使用 `ansible.builtin.copy` 将 `src: nginx.conf` 复制到 `dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf`，并 `notify` 处理器 `Restart nginx`
- Handler：使用 `ansible.builtin.service` 重启 nginx（name: nginx, state: restarted）
template:
---
- name: 
  hosts: 
  become: 
  tasks:
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.copy:
        
      notify: 
  handlers:
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.service:
answer:
---
- name: Configure nginx with handler
  hosts: webservers
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Copy nginx config
      ansible.builtin.copy:
        src: nginx.conf
        dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      notify: Restart nginx
  handlers:
    - name: Restart nginx
      ansible.builtin.service:
        name: nginx
        state: restarted

title: Conditionals & Loops
description:
Write a playbook using conditionals and loops.

Requirements:
- Target `all` hosts with `become: true`
- Task 1: Install multiple packages using `loop` — install `git`, `curl`, `vim` via `ansible.builtin.apt` with `state: present`
- Task 2: Use `ansible.builtin.debug` to display "This is a Debian system" with `when: ansible_os_family == "Debian"`
description_zh:
编写一个使用条件判断和循环的 playbook。

要求：
- 目标为 `all` 主机，使用 `become: true`
- 任务 1：使用 `loop` 安装多个包 — 通过 `ansible.builtin.apt` 安装 `git`、`curl`、`vim`，`state: present`
- 任务 2：使用 `ansible.builtin.debug` 显示 "This is a Debian system"，条件为 `when: ansible_os_family == "Debian"`
template:
---
- name: 
  hosts: 
  become: 
  tasks:
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.apt:
        
      loop:
        
    - name: 
      ansible.builtin.debug:
        
      when:
answer:
---
- name: Install packages with conditions
  hosts: all
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Install common packages
      ansible.builtin.apt:
        name: "{{ item }}"
        state: present
      loop:
        - git
        - curl
        - vim
    - name: Show OS family info
      ansible.builtin.debug:
        msg: "This is a Debian system"
      when: ansible_os_family == "Debian"

title: Pod
description:
Write a Kubernetes Pod manifest.

Requirements:
- `apiVersion: v1`, `kind: Pod`
- Name: `nginx-pod` in `default` namespace
- One container named `nginx` using image `nginx:1.25`
- Container port: `80`
description_zh:
编写一个 Kubernetes Pod 清单。

要求：
- `apiVersion: v1`，`kind: Pod`
- 名称为 `nginx-pod`，命名空间 `default`
- 一个名为 `nginx` 的容器，镜像 `nginx:1.25`
- 容器端口：`80`
template:
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
  namespace: 
spec:
  containers:
    - name: 
      image: 
      ports:
        - containerPort:
answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: nginx-pod
  namespace: default
spec:
  containers:
    - name: nginx
      image: nginx:1.25
      ports:
        - containerPort: 80

title: Deployment
description:
Write a Kubernetes Deployment manifest.

Requirements:
- `apiVersion: apps/v1`, `kind: Deployment`
- Name: `nginx-deployment`
- `replicas: 3`
- Selector and template labels: `app: nginx`
- Container: name `nginx`, image `nginx:1.25`, port `80`
description_zh:
编写一个 Kubernetes Deployment 清单。

要求：
- `apiVersion: apps/v1`，`kind: Deployment`
- 名称为 `nginx-deployment`
- `replicas: 3`
- Selector 和 template 标签：`app: nginx`
- 容器：名称 `nginx`，镜像 `nginx:1.25`，端口 `80`
template:
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
spec:
  replicas: 
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: 
          image: 
          ports:
            - containerPort:
answer:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nginx-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: nginx
          image: nginx:1.25
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80

title: Service
description:
Write a Kubernetes Service manifest.

Requirements:
- `apiVersion: v1`, `kind: Service`
- Name: `nginx-service`
- Type: `ClusterIP`
- Selector: `app: nginx`
- Port: `80`, targetPort: `80`
description_zh:
编写一个 Kubernetes Service 清单。

要求：
- `apiVersion: v1`，`kind: Service`
- 名称为 `nginx-service`
- 类型：`ClusterIP`
- Selector：`app: nginx`
- 端口：`80`，targetPort：`80`
template:
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
spec:
  type: 
  selector:
    
  ports:
    - port: 
      targetPort:
answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nginx-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: nginx
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80

title: ConfigMap & Secret
description:
Write a ConfigMap and a Pod that uses it.

Requirements:
- ConfigMap: `apiVersion: v1`, `kind: ConfigMap`, name `app-config`, with data `APP_ENV: production` and `LOG_LEVEL: info`
- Pod: name `app-pod`, container name `app`, image `busybox:1.36`, command `["sh", "-c", "env && sleep 3600"]`
- Mount the ConfigMap as environment variables using `envFrom` with `configMapRef`

Use `---` to separate the two documents.
description_zh:
编写一个 ConfigMap 和使用它的 Pod。

要求：
- ConfigMap：`apiVersion: v1`，`kind: ConfigMap`，名称 `app-config`，数据 `APP_ENV: production` 和 `LOG_LEVEL: info`
- Pod：名称 `app-pod`，容器名 `app`，镜像 `busybox:1.36`，命令 `["sh", "-c", "env && sleep 3600"]`
- 使用 `envFrom` 的 `configMapRef` 将 ConfigMap 挂载为环境变量

使用 `---` 分隔两个文档。
template:
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
data:
  
---
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
spec:
  containers:
    - name: 
      image: 
      command: 
      envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name:
answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: app-config
data:
  APP_ENV: production
  LOG_LEVEL: info
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: app-pod
spec:
  containers:
    - name: app
      image: busybox:1.36
      command: ["sh", "-c", "env && sleep 3600"]
      envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: app-config

title: PersistentVolumeClaim
description:
Write a PVC and a Pod that mounts it.

Requirements:
- PVC: `apiVersion: v1`, `kind: PersistentVolumeClaim`, name `data-pvc`, accessModes `ReadWriteOnce`, storage request `1Gi`
- Pod: name `data-pod`, container name `app`, image `busybox:1.36`, command `["sh", "-c", "sleep 3600"]`
- Mount the PVC at `/data` using `volumeMounts` and `volumes` with `persistentVolumeClaim`

Use `---` to separate the two documents.
description_zh:
编写一个 PVC 和挂载它的 Pod。

要求：
- PVC：`apiVersion: v1`，`kind: PersistentVolumeClaim`，名称 `data-pvc`，accessModes `ReadWriteOnce`，存储请求 `1Gi`
- Pod：名称 `data-pod`，容器名 `app`，镜像 `busybox:1.36`，命令 `["sh", "-c", "sleep 3600"]`
- 使用 `volumeMounts` 和 `volumes` 中的 `persistentVolumeClaim` 将 PVC 挂载到 `/data`

使用 `---` 分隔两个文档。
template:
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
spec:
  accessModes:
    - 
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 
---
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
spec:
  containers:
    - name: 
      image: 
      command: 
      volumeMounts:
        - name: 
          mountPath: 
  volumes:
    - name: 
      persistentVolumeClaim:
        claimName:
answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: data-pvc
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: data-pod
spec:
  containers:
    - name: app
      image: busybox:1.36
      command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 3600"]
      volumeMounts:
        - name: data-volume
          mountPath: /data
  volumes:
    - name: data-volume
      persistentVolumeClaim:
        claimName: data-pvc

title: Ingress
description:
Write a Kubernetes Ingress manifest.

Requirements:
- `apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1`, `kind: Ingress`
- Name: `app-ingress`
- Annotation: `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /`
- Rule: host `app.example.com`, path `/` with `pathType: Prefix`
- Backend: service name `nginx-service`, port number `80`
description_zh:
编写一个 Kubernetes Ingress 清单。

要求：
- `apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1`，`kind: Ingress`
- 名称为 `app-ingress`
- 注解：`nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /`
- 规则：主机 `app.example.com`，路径 `/`，`pathType: Prefix`
- 后端：service 名称 `nginx-service`，端口号 `80`
template:
apiVersion: 
kind: 
metadata:
  name: 
  annotations:
    
spec:
  rules:
    - host: 
      http:
        paths:
          - path: 
            pathType: 
            backend:
              service:
                name: 
                port:
                  number:
answer:
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: app-ingress
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
spec:
  rules:
    - host: app.example.com
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: nginx-service
                port:
                  number: 80
